interpretation_note: CDK1 is a core cell-cycle kinase; dependency signals are likely to carry broad essentiality risk.
MKI67 is primarily a proliferation marker; dependency or expression signals may reflect tumor growth rate rather than targetability.
TOP2A is linked to proliferation and DNA topology; strong dependency may reflect broad essentiality.
AURKA is a mitotic kinase; dependency should be checked for selectivity versus general proliferation.
MMP9 is best interpreted through invasion, microenvironment, and remodeling biology rather than direct dependency alone.
